webSearch.apiKey.label: Bocha API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Bocha API key for web search.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Bocha Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional Bocha chat-completions base URL override. Default is 'https://api.bocha.cn/v1'.

webSearch.content.label: Bocha Content
webSearch.content.help: Whether to return original web contents. Default is false.
